info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: dantyozmAntaH  ' hiMsAyAM Sasati ' ( Slo. 184) iti devaH  ' vaDe ' iti vopadevaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'avaSasA niHSasA parASasopArima' (aTarva॰6.45.2) parASasA=parANmuKahiMsanena upArimeti liwyuttamabahuvacane rUpam
'avaSasA niHSasA yatparASasopArima jAgrato yatsvapantaH' (aTarva0 6452) avaSasA avastAd hiMsanena avapUrvAcCaseH kvip
'anumantA viSasitA nihantA krayavikrayI' (manu0 551) viSasitA'NgAni yaH kartaryAdinA pfTak karoti
'tasyAstvaM duhitustaTA viSasanaM kiM dAruRe'mfzyaTAH' (uttara0 45) viSasanaM kadanaM nibarhaRam
'SoRitodAM raTAvartAM kftvA viSasane nadIm' (BA0 droRa0 1643) viSasanaM saNgaraH yudDaBUH
'DfziSasI vEyAtye' (PA0 7219) vEyAtye DArzwye'vinaye viSasta iti Bavati anyatra viSasitaH
'mAM vA hareyustvadDastAd viSaseyuraTApi vA' viSaseyuH=hiMsyuH anyatra viSasanaM vikartanaM Bavati
'yadASasA vadato me vicukzuBe' (aTarva0 7591) ASasA dAtfBiH kftena yAcYAnApratiGAtena BartsanapraharaRAdirUpeRa hiMsanena (sAyaRaH)
